---
title: "PUM-seq"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---


[Project overview](overview.html)

[Pipeline](pipeline.html)

[Quality control using rRNA, sites filtered by depth & ratio](qc_rRNA.html)

[Quality control using rRNA, sites filtered by chisq fdr & ratio diff](qc_rRNA_chisq.html)

[Quality control using mRNA, sites filtered by chisq fdr & ratio diff](qc_mRNA_chisq.html)
